name: Brad Parscale, Trump for President
subject: This. Is. Huge. (Get a free hat!)
body:
In honor of the 4th of July, we're giving away FREE hats. | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uTL8QEgoSnkkdeTFgrksRYM) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

This 4th of July, want to help Make America Great Again?

In honor of Independence Day we're offering a special deal. [**Donate $25 or more and get a FREE "Make America Great Again" hat! Get yours today!**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uTP8bZH8dSiiXqLeEN3ru4n)
| | |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uTT7xl7RznghHCCO38Mq69Y) |
| |
**[DONATE $25 NOW](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uTX6SGyAUSegrOunruvoIfz)**

I love these hats. Wear it everywhere and tell people why you support Donald Trump.

Let's put one of our "Make America Great Again" hats in EVERY neighborhood in America.

Hurry, this deal is in honor of Independence Day and won't last long.

Brad Parscale
Digital Director, Donald Trump for President

**[DONATE $25 NOW](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uU16e1Zkgncfc0lWPQenkla)**

| |
| [**Click Here**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11uU94UIQMXn8cGo55CxGkywm) To Stand With Donald Trump and |

name: Kellan White
subject: Celebrating tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2623692158443454464/-8049597194715529216?refcode=e20160703&refcode2=e20160703nd&amount=25)
---
Friend,

I'm proud to live in the greatest country in the world -- and I can't wait to celebrate our nation's birthday tomorrow.

But we all know that many people still don't get the same chance to experience the promise of America. And for too many of our family and friends and neighbors, the American Dream is still just out of reach.

So tomorrow, before the cookouts and fireworks, let's take a moment to remember that when we come together, we really can make a difference. Let's renew our resolve to make this country better, stronger, and safer -- for everyone -- and keep moving forward.

That's what our campaign is all about. That's what we're fighting for together.

I'm glad you're with us.

Thanks,

Kellan White
Political Director

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 or more today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/2623692158443454464/-8049597194715529216?refcode=e20160703&refcode2=e20160703nd&amount=25 "https://act.myngp.com/el/2623692158443454464/-8049597194715529216?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2623692158443454464/-8121654788753457152).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Bullock
subject: under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

We're sorry to send you yet another email. But the fundraising reports are out, and Greg Gianforte has dumped in another $100,000 of his personal fortune into this race.

If that wasn't enough, nasty mailers attacking Steve from Koch brothers-aligned Americans for Prosperity have started hitting mailboxes across the state.

Steve has consistently outraised Mr. Gianforte because of incredible supporters like you. But the cavalry is coming in for Greg Gianforte and it's more important than ever that we keep up our strong grassroots fundraising. **[Will you help us fight back with a donation of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tW8gAhZGYUKFEAv9%2FYxyltPyIGAdItr5)**

Thanks so much,

Team Bullock
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vr9sQ%2BHMpmIJq7rNz4l6I9PyIGAdItr5)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HgGUpDAX5cAcLF94ZfRjY9PyIGAdItr5).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

body:

[**Add your name before midnight tonight to see Hamilton with Hillary.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 7/3/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTY5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyMTg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: It’s your honest-to-goodness LAST CHANCE
body:
This is it | Friend --

This is it -- tonight is your real, official, honest-to-goodness LAST CHANCE to get your name in the hat to see _Hamilton_ with Hillary -- **[so you’d better add your name right now!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTY5NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyNDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ll be booking your flight and hotel, so you’ll have to let me know your feelings on aisle v. window. (You can make your guest take the middle seat -- after all, you’re gifting them a free trip to New York City to see _Hamilton_ with our next president!)

I was lucky enough to see the show, so I know you’re going to love it. Plus, seeing it with Hillary? You’ll remember that for the rest of your life.

**So don’t throw away your shot -- add your name now, and here’s hoping I’ll call you next week to set up your travel!** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTY5NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyNDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Mike

Mike Taylor
Project Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4OTY5NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwNDMyNDIyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

(You can make your guest take the middle seat -- after all, you’re gifting them a free trip to New York City to see Hamilton with our next president!) I was lucky enough to see the show, so I know you’re going to love it. Plus, seeing it with Hillary? You’ll remember that for the rest of your life. So don’t throw away your shot -- add your name now, and here’s hoping I’ll call you next week to set up your travel!
